list_directory.name: List Directory
list_directory.description: Lists all files and subdirectories in the project path.

read_file.name: Read File
read_file.description: Reads the content of a file in the workspace.

write_file.name: Write File
write_file.description: Writes content to a file in the workspace (creates directory if missing).

execute_command.name: Execute Command
execute_command.description: Runs a shell command in the project workspace root.

search_codebase.name: Search Codebase
search_codebase.description: Searches workspace files for a text string.

git_commit.name: Git Commit with AI Audit
git_commit.description: Stages changes, logs AI agent/LLM prompt context audit data, and commits to git.
